sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79598" key="parqenotrofhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρθενο-τροφητέον</orth>, <sense id="n79598.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must keep virgin</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
